name: Sicilian Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut slits into the meat and stuff alternately with black olives, stuffed olives, bits of garlic, and salt pork.
2. Dredge the meat in flour and brown in hot oil.
3. Add tomatoes, raisins, and onions; season with salt and pepper.
4. Cover and cook in a moderate 350 degree oven for 2 1/2 hours or until tender. Check occasionally and add water if needed.
